description: A 3D printing technician needs to verify the geometric complexity of a cranial reconstruction from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan in InVesalius 3. Generate a 3D surface of the skull using the 'Bone' mask preset (226-3071 HU) and export it as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/skull.stl. Record the mesh statistics (number of triangles, volume, and surface area) in a text report at /home/ga/Documents/mesh_stats.txt. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
